Wi Losing and Recovering Power 
Points ‘Whenever a character attempts fo use a mu- tant power, his power attribute is reduced, whether or not he uses il successfully, Fach time a power is used, the character's power atvibute is reduced by 1 to 5 points, at the gamemaster’s discretion, Generally, you should call for a loss of 5 points ifthe power was used in a particularly difficult or spec- tacular way, and a loss of 1 if used trivially.
